texto: It just doesn't make sense. They're afraid of technology, becauseof its threat to humanity...yet they don't flinch at taking a life. So obviously they're not big on logic. But there's no shortage of irony.
explicacao: Citação de Dr. Will Caster sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “It just doesn't make sense. They're afraid of technology, becauseof its threat to humanity...yet …” articula reflexao, sci-fi, doesn em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
